# Robert Blazevic — Video Editor

> Portfolio of Robert Blazevic, a video editor for creators who want their videos to feel bigger than content.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, featured work, about, services, and contact for Robert Blazevic.
- [Work](/#work): Selected YouTube and cinematic edits.
- [About](/#about): Background and approach.
- [Services](/#services): Editing services offered.
- [Contact](/#contact): How to get in touch.
